author: Nagano, Yasuhiko
imprint: Anthropological and Linguistic Studies of the Gandaki Area in Nepal II.  (Monumenta Serindica, No. 12).  Tokyo: ILCAA
title: A Manang glossary
notes: JP 6/26/97:  The entire wordlist has been entered.  It is ordered according to S. Hattori's "Linguistic Questionnaire" (1957), which is by semantic field.  Some normalization of transcription has been carried out.  I have only found the following four correspondences (left side is original, right side is database):  e/E, VV/V:, ng/engma, ?/glottal stop.  Straightforward wordlist format.  Source is located (physically) in Kitamura 1984 ("Anthropological and Linguistic Studies of the Gandaki area in Nepal II"), in Room 2, on shelf.  Green cover.
